title: vaccinium parvum
intro: Vaccinium parvum, also known as the small cranberry or small bilberry, is a low-growing, shrubby plant that belongs to the heath family. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Vaccinium parvum include its potential to help prevent urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, and support overall cardiovascular health. Vaccinium parvum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed fresh or frozen to preserve its nutritional content.
